en.metadata.name: OpenAI Messages → Chat
en.plugin.description: Adapt /v1/messages and /v1/responses clients to upstream /v1/chat/completions semantics
en.config.strictValidation.label: Strict validation
en.config.strictValidation.description: Reject ambiguous Responses/Threads-style fields instead of guessing conversion semantics
en.config.allowShortPathAlias.label: Allow /messages,/responses aliases
en.config.trimWhitespace.label: Trim reasoning content
en.config.trimWhitespace.description: Trim assistant reasoning_content before forwarding downgraded requests

zh-CN.metadata.name: OpenAI Messages → Chat 适配器
zh-CN.plugin.description: 将 /v1/messages 与 /v1/responses 客户端请求统一适配到上游 /v1/chat/completions 语义
zh-CN.config.strictValidation.label: 严格校验
zh-CN.config.strictValidation.description: 遇到 Responses/Threads 风格歧义字段时直接拒绝，避免猜测式转换
zh-CN.config.allowShortPathAlias.label: 允许 /messages、/responses 别名
zh-CN.config.allowShortPathAlias.description: 同时支持将 /messages 与 /responses 别名重写到 /v1/chat/completions
zh-CN.config.trimWhitespace.label: 裁剪推理文本空白
zh-CN.config.trimWhitespace.description: 转发降级后的请求前，对 assistant reasoning_content 执行 trim
